---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new component or an enhancement to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

**Is this a new component or an enhancement to an existing one?**
- [ ] New component
- [ ] Enhancement to an existing component (which one?)

**Problem it solves**
Describe the problem. What are you trying to build that StampUI does not currently support?

**Proposed API**
Show a rough usage example:

```tsx
<MyComponent prop="value" />
```

**Why it belongs in StampUI**
Explain why this is general enough to be a shared component and not something project-specific.

**Design notes**
Any relevant constraints — must it work dark-mode-first? Does it have specific accessibility requirements?
